## Pages
- [About Us | Chasdei Mordechai](/about): Learn about our mission to restore dignity to families in our community facing hidden crises.
- [Chasdei Mordechai | Restoring Dignity](/home): Help us provide for families in crisis. When Shabbos approaches and the fridge is empty, you can be the answer.
- [Community Raffle | Enter to Win $1000](/raffle): Watch our story and enter the community raffle to win $1000 while supporting families in need.
- [Contact Us - OurOrg | Get in Touch](/contact): Get in touch with OurOrg. Send us a message, give us a call, or visit our office. We
- [Donate | Chasdei Mordechai](/donate): Make a secure donation to Chasdei Mordechai. Feed a family in crisis.
- [Photo Gallery - OurOrg | Our Work in Pictures](/gallery): Browse through our photo gallery showcasing community events, volunteer activities, and the impact of our programs.
